item.title: Local Lab Docker Squid
item.description: My local lab is currently hosted on a laptop running Virtualbox. I’ve chose to use Host-only network on my VMs so that i can bring my lab with me anywhere. The issue with this is that i can only access the VMs webservers on the laptop itself. Now if i want to use another workstation for my lab and remotely connect via SSH, i wont have access on the VMs hosted services like http, etc.
